title: Luscious Indian Paneer Wrap
description: Creamy paneer filling wrapped in blanched corn husks, seasoned with turmeric and herbs for a pillowy, anti‑inflammatory weeknight treat.
instructions: Preheat a dry skillet to medium heat.
Combine paneer, yogurt, cream, ginger‑garlic paste, cumin, coriander, turmeric, chili powder, salt, and lemon juice in a bowl and whisk until smooth.
Let the mixture sit for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
Heat a nonstick pan, add a light spray of oil, and cook the paneer mixture for 4 minutes, stirring, until lightly golden.
Blanch corn husks by boiling for 30 seconds, then drain and pat dry.
Place a husk flat, spread 1–2 tbsp of paneer filling, top with cilantro, mint, cucumber, and a dollop of coconut milk.
Roll the husk tightly into a wrap, sealing the edges with a dab of yogurt.
Lay the wrap seam‑side down on the hot skillet and cook 2 minutes per side until the husk is crisp and golden.
Serve hot with a side of mint yogurt dip.
